demographics.living_situation: lives with a parent who is present at the scene

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg is completely bent the wrong way, and the pain is so bad I think I'm going to pass out. I fell down the stairs and there's a bit of bone sticking out through a bleeding cut on my shin.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened about half an hour ago on the stairs — I can't move my ankle or stand, and I feel sick and dizzy from the pain.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 30 minutes ago, straight after falling down four wooden steps and landing awkwardly on my left leg
symptom_narrative.character: I heard a sickening crack when I landed, and now it's a deep, sharp, unbearable pain right in the middle of my lower leg
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever felt — I feel like I'm going to pass out from it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the middle of my left lower leg, between my knee and my ankle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, not letting up at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — I'm too scared to even touch it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any tiny movement, or even thinking about moving it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel really nauseous and lightheaded, and I've gone all sweaty and pale
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never — I've never broken anything or hurt this leg before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm lying on the floor at the bottom of the stairs and I can't move or get up at all; I can't put any weight on the leg or move my ankle

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the fall happened at home on the internal stairs; a parent is at the scene and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: an obvious sharp bend/angle in the middle of the lower leg where it shouldn't bend
a small (about 2 cm) bleeding cut on the front of the shin with a bit of bone visible poking through the skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by the parent looking at the wound, not a clinician inspection

objective_data_offered.value: swelling and early bruising spreading around the injury
can't move the ankle or bear any weight on the leg
he looks pale and sweaty, is clutching his thigh above the injury and feels sick and faint
